description:
Join us on Wednesday, June 24, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a Klinker Brick tasting featuring Cabernet Sauvignon, Farrah Syrah, Old Vine Zinfandel and Albariño.

Tasting Fee: $15 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Klinker Brick Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 - $19.99 / Winery $24 - Dark plum and cherry with leather, baking spice, clove and a long, structured finish.
  • Klinker Brick Lodi Farrah Syrah 2022 - $18.99 / Winery $24 - Cherry, plum, chocolate and white pepper with juicy acidity and fine tannins.
  • Klinker Brick Old Vine Zinfandel 2022 - $17.99 / Winery $24 - Blackberry, blueberry, cinnamon, vanilla and warm oak spice in a generous Lodi frame.
  • Klinker Brick Albariño 2025 - $15.99 / Winery $20 - Meyer lemon, white peach, apricot and minerality with bright, mouthwatering acidity.

Come taste through Klinker Brick Winery and find your favorite bottle. Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.
title: Klinker Brick Tasting
